group.value: Group K — opponents DR Congo, Uzbekistan, Colombia

qualification.value: Qualified as a UEFA group winner (direct) in 2025 European Qualifiers

recent_form.value: Won the 2025 UEFA Nations League, beating Spain in the final on 8 Jun 2025 (2-2, won on penalties) — their second Nations League title (first team to win it twice). Ronaldo finished as the tournament's top scorer.

wc_role.value: Contender — top-5 ranked, deep squad with a PSG and Premier League core

key_players.value: Cristiano Ronaldo (captain), Vitinha, João Neves, Nuno Mendes, Bruno Fernandes, Bernardo Silva, Rúben Dias

squad_news.value: Martínez's 26-man squad announced 19 May 2026. Cristiano Ronaldo (41) captains Portugal at a record 6th World Cup — more than any player in tournament history — and is expected to start; the World Cup is the one major trophy he has never won.
